commitResults.messageTitle: Add help command to display details of commands to user
commitResults.messageBody:
Users enter 'help' to view all command names and their respective
summaries, or specify a particular command using 'help [Command_name]'
to view a more detailed instruction of that command.
Add help command to display details of commands to user

commitResults.messageTitle: Add ability to sort list of items in inventory
commitResults.messageBody:
Users can view items in inventory list based on increasing or decreasing
quantities or prices.
